LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS ALICIA N. VIANA TRUST AND FRANCISCO VIANA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. NO APPEARANCES, THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS' UNOPPOSED SUMMARY JUDGMENT MOTION IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE DEFENDANTS' IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING AND A PROPOSED JUDGMENT. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER. CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA. DEPUTY: MALONE. MATTER NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-01-2024 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT .
Off Calendar Jun-06-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Hearing re: DEFENDANTS ALICIA N. VIANA TRUST AND FRANCISCO VIANA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

Defendants' unopposed summary judgment motion is granted.

Counsel for the defendants' is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and a proposed judgment.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Malone. Matter not reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2023 Set For Trial On Jul-29-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
